mapper.insert: INSERT INTO outbox_message ( id, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, event_type, payload_jsonb ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{aggregateType}, #{aggregateId}, #{eventType}, CAST(#{payloadJson} AS jsonb) )
mapper.select: SELECT id, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, event_type, CAST(payload_jsonb AS TEXT) AS payload_jsonb FROM outbox_message WHERE id = #{outboxMessageId} AND event_type = #{eventType} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'FAILED') AND attempt_count < #{maxAttempts} FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED

SELECT id, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, event_type, CAST(payload_jsonb AS TEXT) AS payload_jsonb FROM outbox_message WHERE status IN ('PENDING', 'FAILED') AND event_type = #{eventType} AND next_attempt_at <= #{now} AND (status = 'FAILED' OR created_at <= #{pendingBefore}) AND attempt_count < #{maxAttempts} ORDER BY next_attempt_at ASC, created_at ASC LIMIT #{limit} FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
